untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pairs trading strategy with cointegration analysis (ADF test, hedge ratio calculation via OLS regression, spread z-score mean reversion). These are multivariate statistical techniques that cannot be expressed using single-asset technical indicators from the allowed indicator list. The signal also references specific CADF t-statistic thresholds (-3.819 to -3.343) which require real-time cointegration computation between GLD and GDX, not available in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: This is a statistical arbitrage pairs strategy requiring: (1) cointegration testing between two assets, (2) hedge ratio estimation, and (3) spread stationarity monitoring. The backtest engine as specified does not support multivariate cointegration analysis or cross-asset spread calculations. A pairs trading implementation would require custom cointegration indicators or a dedicated pairs trading module external to the standard indicator set.
